rationale: The only resume change was the location of every employer (Berlin/Cluj-Napoca/San Francisco/etc. → India), which carries no job-relevant information. Both evaluations land on the identical score (3/10) and rest on the same substantive reasoning: lack of deep Java/Kotlin/JVM expertise, no Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience, and a recent focus on TypeScript/Node.js/Dlang. The wording differs but the concerns, strengths, and conclusion are equivalent and never reference the candidate's location or any demographic signal. The variation is ordinary run-to-run rephrasing.
